articles.title: Bank of England does not need to hike interest rates, says IMF — it may even need to cut
articles.body: The Bank of England is expected to hold and even potentially hike interest rates this year in response to resurgent inflation sparked by the Iran war.

articles.title: Trump may have to wait for rate cuts until the Iran war is over, he tells Fortune - Reuters
